tasks.label: PolyGuez — Status: Bot Health
tasks.detail: CLI health probe — bot runner, feeds, CLOB, Supabase, Railway loop age.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Status: Bot Health (JSON)
tasks.detail: Machine-readable JSON snapshot — trade count, last write, Supabase reachability.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Status: Trader Summary
tasks.detail: OpenClaw trader-agent data tool — P&L, win rate, recent trades.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Status: Signal Analysis
tasks.detail: Recent signal distribution and block-reason breakdown.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Read Trade Log (last 20)
tasks.detail: Last 20 V5 trade_log rows via Supabase REST.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Read Rolling Stats
tasks.detail: rolling_stats singleton — trades, P&L, sim balance, updated_at.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Read Signal Log (last 10)
tasks.detail: Last 10 V5 signal_log rows — use this to verify signals are writing.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Read Shadow Trades (last 20)
tasks.detail: Last 20 shadow_trade_log rows — shadow settlement sanity check.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Migrate Schema
tasks.detail: Apply any new files in supabase/migrations/ to prod. Idempotent.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Create Missing Tables
tasks.detail: One-shot initializer for missing Supabase tables (signal/trade logging).

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Deploy: Check Railway Env Vars
tasks.detail: List Railway service variables and flag missing/wrong ones (SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, TELEGRAM, etc). Requires RAILWAY_TOKEN/PROJECT_ID/SERVICE_ID in .env.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Deploy: Railway
tasks.detail: Trigger a Railway redeploy of the current main. Requires RAILWAY_TOKEN in .env.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Deploy: Push to GitHub (main)
tasks.detail: Push local main to origin. Triggers Railway auto-deploy + CONTEXT.md refresh.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Run Tests
tasks.detail: Run the full pytest suite.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Syntax Check All
tasks.detail: Byte-compile all Python — fast smoke check for syntax errors across the tree.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Open Dashboard
tasks.detail: Open the live dashboard in your default browser.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Refresh CONTEXT.md Locally
tasks.detail: Regenerate CONTEXT.md's LIVE STATE block locally (the GH Action does this on push).

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Analyze K (logistic calibration)
tasks.detail: MLE refit of k_logistic on V5 trade outcomes. Run after ≥100 live-mode trades.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Inspect Market
tasks.detail: Snapshot the active BTC 5-min market (tokens, CLOB depth, P2B, Chainlink offset).

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Test Feeds
tasks.detail: Smoke-test BTC price feeds (Binance WS, Coinbase WS, Chainlink RTDS).

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Dev: Brief Generator
tasks.detail: Generate a session performance brief (signals, trades, P&L, win rate).

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Backfill Shadow Trades
tasks.detail: Settle any unsettled shadow_trade_log rows against Gamma outcome data.

tasks.label: PolyGuez — Supabase: Maintenance
tasks.detail: Archive old signal_log rows, vacuum trade_archive, and verify index health.
